purpose: Craft examples for procedural clue work, evidence pressure, interrogation turns, and source-grounded investigative progression.
source_priority_rules: Source text and locked payload outrank this example pack.
Use examples only to shape evidence handling, timeline pressure, and procedural escalation.
Do not invent clues, forensic results, suspects, or confessions unless the source supports them.
genre_boundary: Show who observed what, how the clue changes the theory, and what procedural step follows.
Keep the case logic readable through object handling, questioning, and timeline correction.
Do not replace clue work with random thriller noise.

scene_card_examples.visual: The locked investigator notices a source-grounded contradiction in the evidence layout and stops the room on that detail.
scene_card_examples.voiceover: The case turns when one visible fact stops matching the story around it.

asset_goal.purpose: clue layout, investigator hand, contradiction anchor

script_scene_examples.visual: An interrogation, evidence check, or timeline review produces one clear procedural next step.
script_scene_examples.voiceover: A real lead does not end the case; it changes the next question.

dialogue.speaker: locked investigator
dialogue.line: Then explain why the time stamp moves.

script_scene_examples.action_result: The case gains a new direction, suspect pressure, or evidence requirement.

dialogue_style_examples: Let every question point to a visible contradiction, missing fact, or next procedure.

negative_examples.bad: Add a surprise confession or miracle clue with no evidence chain.
negative_examples.why_bad: It breaks procedural fairness and weakens the casework rhythm.

forbidden_drift: Do not swap lead character identity, role hierarchy, or speaker authority without source support.
Do not introduce a new clue, report, weapon, device, or object unless the source seeds it.
Do not change scene location, route, door line, or blocking position without a visible causal bridge.
Do not alter relationship status, knowledge state, or alliance state without source support.
Do not change cause and effect so an investigative breakthrough appears unsupported.

image: Lock clue layout, investigator stance, object order, and the contradiction anchor that drives the turn.
video: Preserve continuity between observation, interrogation, and the new procedural state created by the clue.
